Autonomous AI Negotiation for Modern SMBs
Streamlining vendor contracts through Agentic Intelligence — so you never leave money on the table again.
Kavya TrivediHarsh ValandPranav Dabhi Aarav PatelTanisha ViholJainisha Desai
The Problem
Procurement is Broken.
For SMBs, vendor negotiations are a costly, opaque, and time-draining exercise — and the odds are stacked against them.

$10K+ Lost Annually

Small businesses lose over $10K each year due to unoptimized vendor renewals and missed negotiation opportunities.

15+ Hours Per Contract

Manual negotiation consumes over 15 hours per contract on average, draining valuable team resources and focus.

No Transparency

Lack of pricing visibility gives vendors the upper hand, leaving SMBs with unfavorable terms they never questioned.

The Solution
Your 24/7 AI Procurement Officer.
Negotio.ai deploys autonomous AI agents that negotiate, analyze, and optimize your vendor contracts — continuously, without you lifting a finger.

Autonomous Negotiation

AI agents communicate directly with vendor APIs and emails, negotiating terms and renewals on your behalf — in real time.

Contract Intelligence

Instant parsing and analysis of vendor agreements — hidden clauses, auto-renewals, and unfavorable terms surfaced immediately.

One-Click Optimization

Negotio.ai surfaces better vendor alternatives and pricing benchmarks in real time, so you always know your options.

Market Opportunity
A $15 Billion Untapped Market.

Who We Serve

SaaS-heavy startups and mid-sized manufacturing firms with complex vendor stacks and no dedicated procurement team.

Beachhead Market

SaaS-stack SMBs with 10–500 employees — companies that feel the pain of procurement most acutely and have the most to gain.

Traction Plan

Free "Contract Audit" tool to acquire the first 100 users — proving value before asking for commitment.

$15B
Global Procurement
Software Market
